title: Modern Odyssey: Season 2
description: Similar to its predecessor, this modpack is meant to expand and enrich the the world. This is meant for an SMP I will be running, but you are open to try it out for yourself.
body:
Modern Odyssey: Season 2 builds upon the rich and engaging experience of its predecessor by introducing a host of new content that enhancing what Season 1 accomplished in addition to introducing new content.

### **The Mission**

The first season focused on dynamic exploration, visual upgrades, performance improvements, better inventory management, immersive interactions, and unique additions, Season 2 takes it further with advanced machinery, expanded flora, new biomes, and a variety of niche enhancements. This will transform your Minecraft world with new (familiar to some) mechanics, stunning landscapes, and endless new adventures to discover. Embark on a thrilling journey where every corner holds fresh opportunities and discoveries.

### **Warning**

For those that used the previous [season's modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/modern-odyssey), it is recommend you start a whole new world instead of transfering your world from it to this modpack. The reasons why is because 1) World generation has been completely overhauled by the Continents mod, which reshapes "... the world so that landmasses are further apart, varying in size and shape..." 2) Biomes O' Plenty will add "...a slew of new, unique biomes to the Overworld, Nether, and End..." which may be affected if transfering from an old world from Season 1.
